chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S- 716 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of MA No.5954/2024 (S/A) 26-05-2025 Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, Advocate for the applicant Mr. Ubedullah Malano, Advocate for respondent No.04 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, learned counsel for the applicant, submits that the parties have amicably resolved the matter outside the Court. This statement is affirmed by the learned counsel for respondent No.04, who further submits that the said respondent does not want to register the FIR and has no objection if the impugned order dated 18.11.2024, passed by the learned Additional Sessions Judge-IV/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Sukkur, in Crl. Misc. Application No.3901/2024 (Re: Faisal Qureshi vs. The State and others), is set aside. In view of the above submissions made by the learned counsel for respondent No.04, the learned Additional Prosecutor General also concedes to setting aside the impugned order. Under the circumstances, the instant Crl. Misc. Application is allowed and the aforesaid impugned order dated 18.11.2024, is hereby set aside. J U D G E Naveed Ali
